author: sabine KEMPfe
review: Erin is a god send. She was super friendly, attentive and informative. She worked with me for our special move in circumstance, and considered both my needs and the needs of the owner until we came up with a solution, which shows she is

ownerResponse.text: Hi Sabine, thank you for your kind feedback! We truly appreciate that you recognize our efforts, and look forward to working with you.

author: Roberto Chavarria
review: Best experience ever! With the housing market the way it is right now not everybody cares about the renters so much, well this is not the case of Roma Management, they were all very supportive and listening specially Erin, we moved from a

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for sharing your experience with us and seeing the value in the service we provide, we(I) do care and it's so nice to see that it is apprecaited. It was a pleasure to work with you and your family. If you ever need another rental in the future we would love to work with you again.

author: Kayleigh Banks
review: We are so happy with Roma Management. I rented a gorgeous apartment in Ferndale from them for a few years and then when my relationship changed they helped me coordinate a transfer to a different apartment and really made a very difficult

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your very kind feedback, we truly appreciate that you took the time to share your experience. Thrilled to hear you have enjoyed your time with us thus far and look forward to working with you in the future..

author: Jessica Warrick
review: Erin from Roma made our renting experience wonderful. Her attentiveness and dedication to making every interaction human instead of a cold corporate response was refreshing, to say the least. She truly went above and beyond, setting a new

ownerResponse.text: Hi Jessica,  Thank you for your very kind feedback! It is so rewarding when you see that someone like you appreciate all that we do. We truly love helping people. All the best to you moving forward.

author: Chris Throop
review: I first applied to the apartment without even looking at it, knowing that it was a solid place and very good location. My first visit to the apartment complex  was comfortable, the setup of the building feels new and modern. Everything

author: egoowen
review: I put in eight maintenance requests and only one was taken care of because it was a leak in the sink and it would damage their property. 2 years I was being strung along with a simple door fix.

ownerResponse.text: Please do not base your judgement/opinion about Roma Management by this review, there is so much more to this situation than the person is willing to share, lease violations etc.

author: Colleen Johnson
review: So far from my moving in 3 years ago to now they have been great. Erin always answers my calls and is very helpful. They are great. The owner has some things they should maintain better but the property managers can't make them do it but I

ownerResponse.text: Hi Colleen, Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback, it has been a pleasure to work with you these past few years.

author: Andrea Velasco
review: Erin is the best!! She always try to helps and make things easy. I had a great experience renting with Roma Management.

ownerResponse.text: It was a pleasure working with you as well. Thank you for sharing your experience with us. All the best with your move.

author: Lynn G
review: Erin Galbraith is amazing! She worked her hardest to help my family get into a place and has been a sweetheart the whole time. Thank you so much!

ownerResponse.text: It was a pleasure working with you and your family. Thank you!

author: Dima Karashchuk
review: Had a great experience staying at Willy Flats. Roma Management  helped us out all of the two years that we stayed there. Great team, great communication skills.

ownerResponse.text:
Hi Dima, thank you for your positive review, we appreciate your feedback. We enjoyed working with you these past two years. All the best.
Erin - Roma Management

author: Victoria Alvarez
review: Erin is one of the most attentive Property Managers I have worked with.  I have tried to apply to a couple of different properties in Bellingham and had to always chase them down to get a reply.  I spoke with Erin after the office was

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for your kind words and you amazing review, Victoria. We really appreciate you taking the time to share your experience with us and the community. It is so nice to hear that our efforts are making a difference. We look forward to working with you.

author: Ilya Shportko
review: Really awesome service. I enjoyed my stay there. Everything went well. Erin did a really great job helping my wife and I get in the unit and out. We were able to successfully receive our security deposit as well. I would recommend them any day.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your kind words, we enjoyed working with you as well. All the best to you both moving forward.

author: Irena Kolbert
review: Nice and fancy units I have to say! There is always parking in the Ferndale Willy Flats, and it was overall a great experience. I didn't like that they kept my $1250 deposit when I moved out early though. There were no damages at all in my

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your comments - Regrettably the security deposit is forfeited if you break your lease agreement with us, this is our policy and also listed in the lease agreement signed by all residents. Not all management companies manage to the same criteria that is why it is very important to know what you are signing. Happy to hear you generally enjoyed your time with us.

author: Jin Soo Hong
review: We feel blessed in getting to work with Erin of finding our new apartment in Bellingham, WA. She is very kind will find you the perfect home / apartment that meets your need. If google had 10 stars rating, she deserves full 10 stars.

author: Steven Boring
review: Erin is very easy to work with and does her Job well. If you need something and she doesn't have the answer she will go out of her way to try and find it. I've dealt with 3 other property management companies and this one has been by far the best. Thanks Erin!

ownerResponse.text: Hi Steven it has been a pleasure to work with you. Thank you for your kind words.

author: Alberta Garcia
review: I moved in when the complex was built, I loved living here and would live here forever if I could. Erin was an amazing property manager, she was always responsive and super professional. She always worked with us whenever we needed

ownerResponse.text: Thank you Alberta - I truly have enjoyed working with you over the years - I will miss you! All the best!

author: Julie Jakobitz
review: Erin does an amazing job!  I worked closely with her for several weeks getting someone placed at one of the properties.  This case ended up having a ton more paperwork than usual.  Erin was dedicated to working with me and getting this

ownerResponse.text: Julie it was a pleasure to work with you as well. It was wonderful to work as a team to place your client. You make a difference.

author: Liana Harvey
review: Had a pretty great experience with Roma. Erin was very nice and helpful with the moving in and out process and was always pleasant to talk to. Great location of units and will definitely keep in mind for any future moves.

ownerResponse.text: It was a pleasure working with you. Thank you so much for your sharing your experience with other.

author: Justine Griffith
review: I have been with Roma Management for almost a year now. Whenever I have a problem, they are quick to respond and show they truly do care for your best interest. I've spoken with all of the staff and each one has been nothing but kind and

ownerResponse.text: Justine - we appreciate you and your patience with this unique situation.

author: Tanya Chase
review: I moved into the Ferndale location about two and a half years ago. Since then I have had to call Roma a handful of times for everything ranging from noise complaints to trash to questions about decorating my door they have always been quick

author: Lio C
review: Erin was extremely rude to my partner on the phone. Hung up on him when he asked about getting the lease contract in writing. The rude behavior only started after we had turned in our applications-- which is when they would have learned

ownerResponse.text: This information is disappointing to hear. I always go out of my way to assist someone and feel there is more to this then the person is wanting to share and why they did not reveal their real name.

author: Jacob Olsen
review: We came from another complex (VABC) where management was sub-par. Our experience has been awesome with Roma. We had a delay with our complex opening and they worked with us and even offered to help us out with storing our stuff. Erin is a

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much Jacob for your kind words! We are so pleased to have you as a resident!

author: jmajor29
review: I rented from Roma for 3 years and never had a problem with them. The customer service in the office was Outstanding! The apartments are beautiful. The appliances worked perfect! I Never had a problem with mold or bug's in the apartment.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for taking the time to give us your thoughts - We will miss you! All the best!

author: John Snow
review: Knew people in the past years who went through this company and it was a terrible experience. Borderline criminal in stealing tenant's deposits. Bogus fees and charges for no legitimate reasons. Unprofessional at the least.

ownerResponse.text: Hi John - Roma takes great pride in following our move out procedures and ensure that every tenant is fully aware of charges when they sign the lease agreement, and even inform the tenant again when they notify us that they are leaving. We are always willing to discuss move expenses with our outgoing tenants and have invoices and photos to support. Remember there are always two sides to every situation.

author: Marva Biggar
review: This place is an absolute scam. I asked what I needed to do to break my lease early and was advised I would need to forfeit my deposit and provide an intent to vacate. I sent them my intent to vacate, 5/30 and was completely out of the unit

ownerResponse.text: Hi Marva Biggar, thanks for sharing your feedback. We are sorry to hear you didn't have a great experience. We take your feedback seriously and hope you'll give us another chance.

author: Skye Saxon
review: I lived at a Roma property with roommates while I was going to school in Bellingham, it took MONTHS to find a place and none of the several places I looked at compared to this apartment. Our unit was spacious and modern and close to I-5 and

ownerResponse.text: Thank you for your review. We are glad that you had a good experience with Roma Management.

author: Duncan (hikesafely)
review:
My Deposit was a struggle to get back.

I spent a year in the apartments on W Bakerview. (I left June 2019) During my

ownerResponse.text: Duncan as I had stated that I will refund you the hauling fee that was charged to you.  You should be receiving a check in the mail by the end of the week. Sincerely-Roma Management

author: Jeff Singsaas
review: In the complete free for all of finding a place to rent in Bellingham prior to the school year, I FINALLY spoke to a real person and, fortunately it was Erin at Roma Management.  She was friendly (rare), helpful, knowledgable, and helped

ownerResponse.text: We appreciate you taking the time to leave this review!

author: Abrielle Tolle
review: Erin has gone out of her way to make sure my renting experience was as painless and transparent as possible. I've greatly appreciated the time she's taken to help me out.

ownerResponse.text: It's been a pleasure to work with you as well. Thank you for renting with Roma Management.

author: Amber Abapo
review: Haven't gotten to our maintenance request for 3 months now. Almost 4. Accusing us of not nofiying them of our pet rabbit. Bills us a $200 "late" bunny fee. Tells us they gave us a PAPER notification about the rabbit hutch outside when we

ownerResponse.text:
Thank you for your impute.  We are disappointed to hear that you have been so displeased. We again apologize for the rushed process you experienced at move-in. This dissatisfaction is precisely why we no longer bend on our move-in dates for residents, even if they plead with us to allow them to move in sooner. Unfortunately, things fall through the cracks, such as an overlooked pet or not enough time to perform touch up painting, which was the downside to your move in.

In reference to unauthorized items on patios, please understand that everyone who is in violation of these policies is notified to rectify them, whether the tenant does so immediately is a different story. In which case we continue to take action with these tenants who are in violation.

Thank you for being prompt to comply with the patio polices.

We wish you all the best in your further adventures in the renting world.

author: Daniel Karpov
review: I've been a first time tenant with this property management since July 2018. I had emailed them numerous times about overflowing dumpsters/recycling bins, unauthorized vehicles parking, and maintenance issues and not once have received a

ownerResponse.text: We appreciate your input and would like to work with you about these issues.We have been working hard to resolve these issues however it is a tedious task and we will continue to work on this.

author: kyle shadowchain
review: I have not actually dealt with the owners or any staff...but I have been waiting a good almost 10 minutes for someone to come by the office in romark flats to apply for their 2 bed 1 bath apartment. The office is not supposed to close till

ownerResponse.text: Hi Kyle! We apologize for not being in the office when you came by. We do have limited staff this week as some called out. With it being the summer months it is an extremely busy season and we are out showing units and preforming move-ins almost everyday. It is best to schedule a tour with us in the future. To avoid future frustrations we will be changing our hours to "Be Appointment Only". Again we are apologetic for missing you earlier today. All the Best to you.

author: Erica Gonzalez
review: They left during the pandemic and let all the weeds overtake the apartments. When they came back and without warning they sprayed herbicide during the middle of the weekday at like 4pm. When I brought this to the owners attention he said

ownerResponse.text: The move-out paperwork was sent out on September 17th which is well within the 21 day time frame that is required by law. Per the tenants request the Move-out paperwork was sent to their employers address. Our office was just notified today, Thursday, 9/24 at 9:00 am. We addressed immediately, confirmed the mailing address, sent an  electronic disposition letter and stated we would issue you a new check if they still could not find the letter sent to employer, tenant agreed.  Rather then writing this review I wish they would have contacted us earlier to resolve.

author: Jessica Coogan
review: Erin is so helpful and a great person to work with. They provide excellent customer service and provide as much leniency as they can given lease restrictions.

ownerResponse.text: It is a pleasure to work with you. Thank you for your tenancy with us.

author: Austins Challenges
review: Warning for everyone applying here. The 100$ fee does not do anything. After placing the holding fee and turning in our applications we find out they rented our place out to someone else while we had the hold on the place and they hadn't

ownerResponse.text:
While we always strive for satisfaction with prospective tenants, unfortunately, things do not always work out. Specifically, in your case, you should have never been allowed to place the holding fee down on the unit until your application had first been approved. We have taken the proper steps to ensure this does not happen again.

We did do our best to offer you another unit we had available at the time, with no response from you.  We do empathize with your disappointment and understand your frustration.  While we know that the refund of the full $100 holding fee could not make up for the lost unit, we had hoped that no ill feelings would set in and that we would have retained you as a resident.

author: Emily Rossing
review: We just got an apartment through Roma and so far it's been a breeze! Amanda and Erin have been so great with the application process and have answered every question for us! We look forward to renting from them.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks so much! We can't wait to serve you again soon.

author: MarLa Williams
review: Erin is fantastic and professional. She was amazing with the move in and outstanding with helping with the move out. Great management by Erin.

ownerResponse.text: Marla, it was a pleasure to work with you as well. Happy to help resolve your move-out from the previous management.

author: Veronica Marie Perez
review: Management has been communicative, helpful, and welcoming. The move-in process was easy, complaints are heard and responded to, and most of the residents Ive met are extremely friendly. Great place to call home!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you Veronica, It's been a pleasure to work with you as well.

author: Jacob D
review: Withholding deposits whimsically, or because they know its on the former tenants time and resources to get it back, is just outrageous. This is a poorly managed establishment. Dont expect to get good response time to your most basic of needs or wants.

ownerResponse.text: False Accusation. This person has no dealings with Roma Management

author: Savvy Shopper
review: Regularly overinflates the values of the homes they list for rent on Zillow.  The last one I checked was overinflated by more than $100,000 over its actual value.  Pity the people dumb enough to rent that.  When you come across a listing by

author: Emmanuelle Maher
review: these folks will NOT give you your deposit back. theyll dodge your calls. not only are they stealing hard-earned wages, but peace of mind, too.

ownerResponse.text: False Accusation. This person has no dealings with Roma Management

author: Leticia Velasco
review: Amazing costumer service! They're always  there for all our needs! we been with them 2 years and we have no complaints ! thank goodness we found a amazing landlord!!! soooooo happy!!!!!

author: Jacob Blankenship
review: Been living in their units for about 3 years now, the unit I have is well built and they respond quickly to my issues that arise.

ownerResponse.text: Thank you Jacob! We strive to give the best service possible. We appreciate you as a resident of Roma Management.

author: Lisl Ost
review: they should really rename the deposit bc YOU DON'T GET IT BACK and that's not a deposit. they've apparently always done this read the other bad reviews

ownerResponse.text: False Accusation. This person has no dealings with Roma Management

author: MegaJabboy
review: Non-communicative and highly unprofessional, these people are currently holding my friend's deposit illegally without any reasoning! No walk out sheet or anything! Really disgusting and illegal, avoid this place!

ownerResponse.text: This tenant was given their disposition letter according to the law and send to the tenant's specifications.

author: Nathan Jaimez
review: Very poor management when it comes to customer service. Not to mention they withhold your deposit. Look elsewhere to avoid this problem. Highly recommend you dont support this establishment. Complete waste of time and money.

ownerResponse.text: False Accusation. This person has no dealings with Roma Management

author: Karma Kinkster
review: Impossible to get deposit back. BE AWARE! They will keep your deposit no matter what.

ownerResponse.text: False Accusation. This person has no dealings with Roma Management

author: steven trujillo
review: I applied for a unit with this company, I was the first to submit all required documentation and they rented the unit out from under me.

ownerResponse.text: Steven, we are very sorry that this did not work out.  Unfortunately there was another application that had been submitted when your application came in.  They did get their final documentation in prior to your last document arriving.  We do have a policy of first come, first serve and do not hold rental units when they are available.  Again, we are sorry this did not work out and wish you well.

author: Makayla Montoya Frazier
review: Dont rent here if you plan on getting a deposit back! Unprofessional and lackluster. They are also LIARS, see below

ownerResponse.text: False Accusation. This person has no dealings with Roma Management

review: If there was a zero star rating they would get it. Terrible! Just dont use them!

ownerResponse.text: False Accusation. This person has no dealings with Roma Management. I find it strange you have the rating since we have never worked with you.

author: Sarah M
review: SCAMMERS!!!!!! They will keep your deposit and ignore your calls!!!!!!!!!!!! If I could give them negative stars I would!!!!!!

ownerResponse.text: False Accusation. This person has no dealings with Roma Management

author: Phil Johnson
review: One of the worst property management's in town.

author: Eliot Tole
review: Worst ever. Dont even bother renting from them.

review: Horrible service. Dont mess with these guys.
